title: phyllanthus macgregorii
intro: Phyllanthus macgregorii, also known as the Macgregor's tree-flower or Macgregor's green, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as dysentery and diarrhea. In traditional medicine, Phyllanthus macgregorii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
